items.headline: Clorox’s 5.5% Yield Is a Safe-Haven Sending Retirees Sprinting Back to This 51-Year Dividend Aristocrat
items.summary: Few consumer staples have been treated as roughly by the higher-for-longer rate regime as Clorox (NYSE:CLX). The stock sits down 18.6% over the past year, pushing the yield to a level rarely seen for a household-name aristocrat. items.headline: Clorox (CLX) Stock Sees Fair Value Cut As Analysts Lower Targets
items.summary: Clorox is back in focus after its fair value estimate was revised from US$115.47 to US$105.29, trimming roughly 9% from the modeled price target. That reset lines up with a wave of target cuts and at least one downgrade, as analysts reassess what investors are willing to pay given the current discussion around execution, margins, and growth.
